The '''Bombaasa Cartel''' was a criminal organization based on [[Pembric II]] during the early years of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. Run by [[Crev Bombaasa/Legends|Crev Bombaasa]], the Cartel had an uneasy alliance with [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]] during his time as ruler of the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]]. A loose collection of criminals from the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], the criminals banded together to fight off challenges and threats from larger organizations such as those run by the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]]. The Cartel operated several legal shipping and mining companies, and maintained a network of contacts that included smugglers, shippers and Imperials. Following [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]]'s retreat from [[Kal'Shebbol/Legends|Kal'Shebbol]], the Cartel took control of Pembric II, and installed a puppet government with pro-Imperial leanings to dissuade New Republic interest in the planet.
